creator: matt@snowtrek.org
text:
There may be an issue with the dependencies for version 2.10.1,1. After I upgraded with Portupgrade, Amavisd would not start, complaining of

ERROR: MISSING REQUIRED BASIC MODULES:
  Net::LibIDN

I desinstall/reinstalled the port and still received the same error. I installed dns/p5-Net-LibIDN and Amavisd started and is working fine, however I do not see dns/p5-Net-LibIDN listed as a dependency for this port.
